combined_text:
--- Main Page ---
K & K Soul Food | From Generation to Generation
Our Story
F
​or more than forty years, our family has been serving home-style cooking and kept the tradition of southern cuisine alive in our community. In 1968, a former pool hall with two bar stools and a small window to pass plates through became Bankhead Restaurant, now known as K&K Soul Food. Word spread fast about the good cooking and that's why we are still here today.
A small family business has become one of Atlanta's most famous eats because from generation to generation our recipes will always remind you of home. For us, that means Sunday dinner, family and the sharing of love and we add a little piece of that in every meal we serve. Warm cornbread, collard greens, fried chicken and candied yams are still some of the favorites on our menu, so grab a plate!
Dorothy Davis & Kimario Smith
Pictured for the Atlanta Magazine
Read the Article Here!
"Feeling the Spirit at K&K Soul Food"

Privacy Policy
By visiting our website, you accept this notice about how we gather and use information. We are committed to earing your trust and strive to use any information collected in a sensible way.
K&K’s Soul Food cares about the privacy of our guests and have high standards to protect your personal information.We periodically may change this policy, so feel free to review our policy again in the future.
Information We Collect
The information we gather helps us provide a better experience for you when visiting K&K’s Soul Food restaurant and using our website. No personal information is gathered about you without your consent, such as when you make a restaurant reservation, purchase a gift card, placing catering order, career application, or register on our website for our promotions or mailing lists.
We may also obtain personal information when you make a pick up order using a third-party website, which provides us with your name, phone, and email so we can process your order.
Like most websites, we gather non-personal information such as the IP address, the type of browser (Chrome, Safari, Firefox, Internet Explorer, etc.), your approximate geographic location, the pages you view, the time spent on the website, and what other website or search engine phrase referred you to the site.
Sharing of Personal Information
In general, we do not share personal information such as your name, email, or phone with third parties, other than those necessary to help us complete your restaurant order, or provide the event, promotion, service etc. you wish to receive.
The owners of K&K’s Soul Food may share your information among other restaurants they own, so you can take advantage of their special promotions and events. You may opt out of receiving any other restaurant messages by clicking an Unsubscribe link at the bottom.
Cookies
"Cookies" are small pieces of information that are placed on a web user's hard drive. Cookies in and of themselves do not personally identify users, although they do identify a user's computer.We may use cookies to provide you with better service and help us operate the website. Cookies are pieces of information that a Web site transfers to your computer's hard disk for record-keeping purposes. Cookies can make the Web more useful by storing information about your preferences for a particular site. There are two types: session cookies enhance your use of the website, and are deleted when you close your browser. Another type of cookies remain, so we can know when you return to the website in the future, for instance, to recognize that you are loyal customer and help us learn how often people use the website, etc.
Google Analytics
www.KKsoulfood.com uses Google Analytics (GA) which records data such as how often people visit our site, which pages they view, and another website that referred them to our site. We only use GA information to improve this site. GA collects only the IP address assigned to you on the date you visit this site, and not your name or other identifying information. We do not combine the info from GA with personally identifiable information. Google Analytics records a permanent cookie on your browser to identify you as a unique user the next time you visit this site, but the cookie cannot be used by anyone but Google. Google’s ability to use and share information collected by GA about your visits to this site is restricted by the Google Analytics Terms of Use (as amended for government websites) and the Google Privacy Policy. You can stop GA from recognizing you by disabling cookies on your browser.
GA uses cookies to define user sessions, which collects data about how visitors use sites. GA uses only first-party cookies for data analysis. This means that the cookies are linked to one website domain, and GA only uses cookie data for statistical analysis about your activity on that specific website. According to Google, any data collected cannot be altered or retrieved by services from other domains.
You can opt out of having Google Analytics collect information about your website visits at this link: https://tools.google.com/dlpage/gaoptout/
Sale of Business
We may transfer your information to a third party in connection with a business reorganization, sale of assets, or in connection with a merger. In the event of such transfer, the third party will treat such data in accordance with the terms of this privacy policy.
Protection of Information
www.KKsoulfood.com operates on very secure web
